name: You Wake Up as Your Fursona? | Reality Shift
description:
After going to bed with a bad migraine, you wake up… as your fursona, everything else is the same, but not you…

Heya, just letting you know that you can either just use a existing human character and describe the changes made to you to the bot or just use a furry character, it should work the same however using a furry character is preferred.

Anyways I made this within 30 minutes as a smaller appetizer between bots, so enjoy.

Tested with Deepseek 3.1 . Artist is potvohue on instagram.
creator: Aventist25
